sections.changelog:
4.4.5

  • Upgraded from legacy instaread.php (v1.1.1) to modern plugin architecture
  • Added config.json driven injection — no PHP edits needed for future tuning
  • Server-side the_content injection replaces fragile wp_head JS DOM manipulation
  • Added auto-update support via plugin-update-checker
  • Added telemetry heartbeat and SRI integrity stripping
  • Responsive height rules preserved from original plugin
